system.name: PenDonn
system.comment: Raspberry Pi Zero 2 W configuration - Single onboard WiFi only

wifi.comment: WARNING: single_interface_mode uses onboard WiFi (wlan0). You WILL lose SSH connection when monitoring starts. Ensure local access via HDMI+keyboard or enable auto-start on boot.

allowlist._comment: SSIDs the daemon is allowed to attack. With strict=true (default), only listed SSIDs get touched. Empty + strict=true = safe scan-only mode.

cracking.comment: Reduced max_concurrent_cracks and brute_max_length for RPi Zero 2 W limited CPU/RAM

enumeration.comment: Enumeration disabled by default on RPi Zero 2 W due to limited resources. Set to T2 timing (slower) if enabled.

performance.comment: Performance tuning for Raspberry Pi Zero 2 W (4 cores @ 1GHz, 512MB RAM)

safety._comment: armed_override is REQUIRED on Zero 2W because single_interface_mode reuses wlan0 for everything; preflight would otherwise reject the duplicate iface assignment. By using this config you explicitly accept SSH loss the moment monitoring starts.
